message:
Command `# Final validation of all artifacts
echo "=== Verification Artifacts ==="
echo ""
echo "--- summary.yaml ---"
python3 -c "
import yaml
from pathlib import Path
s = yaml.safe_load(Path('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/summary.yaml').read_text())
print('overall_status:', s['overall_status'])
print('pass_count:', s['pass_count'])
print('fail_count:', s['fail_count'])
print('total_scenarios:', s['total_scenarios'])
print('simulator:', s['simulator'])
print('exit_code:', s['exit_code'])
"

echo ""
echo "--- Coverage report ---"
head -20 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/coverage_report/coverage_report.txt

echo ""
echo "--- Scenario logs count ---"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/sim_build/*.log | wc -l

echo ""
echo "--- Verification report ---"
head -5 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/dv/verification_report.md

echo ""
echo "--- Verification summary ---"
head -10 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/dv/verification_summary.md` executed with exit code 0.

content:
=== Verification Artifacts ===

--- summary.yaml ---
overall_status: PASS
pass_count: 21
fail_count: 0
total_scenarios: 21
simulator: iverilog 12.0 (Icarus Verilog)
exit_code: 0

--- Coverage report ---
# Coverage Report — mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu
# Generated: 2026-05-29
# Simulator: iverilog 12.0 (Icarus Verilog) — structural stimulus coverage
# Note: GLS netlist coverage is out-of-scope (soft IP RTL deliverable; integrator synthesis path)

SCENARIO_PASS_RATE: 100.0% (21/21)

DOMAIN_COVERAGE:
  AES        : 100.0%  (1/1 scenarios PASS)
  CRC        : 100.0%  (1/1 scenarios PASS)
  DBG        : 100.0%  (1/1 scenarios PASS)
  DMA        : 100.0%  (1/1 scenarios PASS)
  GPIO       : 100.0%  (2/2 scenarios PASS)
  INT        : 100.0%  (2/2 scenarios PASS)
  IRQ        : 100.0%  (1/1 scenarios PASS)
  I2C        : 100.0%  (1/1 scenarios PASS)  [includes I2C2 derivative addition R-006]
  MEM        : 100.0%  (1/1 scenarios PASS)
  PWM        : 100.0%  (1/1 scenarios PASS)
  RTC        : 100.0%  (1/1 scenarios PASS)
  SPI        : 100.0%  (1/1 scenarios PASS)

--- Scenario logs count ---
21

--- Verification report ---
# Verification Report — mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu

**Design:** mspm33c321a_derivative  
**Design Root:** `mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/`

# Final validation of all artifacts
echo "=== Verification Artifacts ==="
echo ""
echo "--- summary.yaml ---"
python3 -c "
import yaml
from pathlib import Path
s = yaml.safe_load(Path('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/summary.yaml').read_text())
print('overall_status:', s['overall_status'])
print('pass_count:', s['pass_count'])
print('fail_count:', s['fail_count'])
print('total_scenarios:', s['total_scenarios'])
print('simulator:', s['simulator'])
print('exit_code:', s['exit_code'])
"

echo ""
echo "--- Coverage report ---"
head -20 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/coverage_report/coverage_report.txt

echo ""

ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/sim_build/*.log | wc -l

echo ""

head -5 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/dv/verification_report.md

echo ""

head -10 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/dv/verification_summary.md
